name: search_web_knowledge
description: Search the web using AutoGen distributed worker for research and information gathering. Use this when the user wants to find information about a topic, research something, or needs current web results.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query or question (e.g., 'AutoGen gRPC architecture', 'latest AI research')

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-10)

force_pre_tool_speech: Let me search the web for that information.
